history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with short, dark, slightly messy hair is sitting down, leaning against a slatted wooden wall. He is wearing a traditional black kimono with wide sleeves and a white obi (sash) around his waist. His left arm is raised, and he is holding a black katana sword vertically, with his hand gripping the textured handle. The sword has subtle white decorative patterns on the scabbard. The lighting suggests it's late afternoon, with warm sunlight casting shadows from the wooden slats onto the ground and the man. The overall mood is serene and somewhat stoic, with a touch of traditional Japanese aesthetic. The color palette is dominated by the dark black of the kimono and sword, the warm browns of the wooden background, and the soft white of the obi and skin tones. The image has a slightly grainy, vintage feel. A watermark with Chinese characters is visible in the bottom center.
